{{Quote|Good idea in case there are more spined snakes, or worse.|[[Dusque Mistflier]]|<ref name="TRoD" />}}
'''Spined snakes''', also called '''spined vipers''', were [[Snake/Legends|snakes]] native to [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].<ref name="TRoD" /> They lived hiding among the rocks and sand of the deserts of their homeworld.<ref name="SWG:SS" /> These predator snakes had venomous spikes along the top ridge of its body and only hunted at daytime.<ref name="TRoD" /> Spined snakes existed in several sizes and varieties.<ref name="SWG:SS" /> Known variants included giant spined snakes, sandy spined snakes and spined snake recluses.<ref name="SWG" />
